title: pdfgate error result
description: stdout of any subcommand on exit code 2 (unreadable input). "parse-failure" = broken / unparseable file; "password-required" = encrypted file that the requested analysis cannot inspect without --password (info and crypto instead succeed with passwordRequired: true, and validate reports a password-protected issue). Exit code 3 (usage error, invalid --policy file) prints no JSON on stdout — diagnostics go to stderr.
